rec: 桃之夭夭（tao zhi yao yao）
Don’t Worry, Up In Yunnan, Chinatown
Golden Eave (made with Roasted Goose Fat Wash Vermouth)
The Dream of Thirty Thousand Girls
Speak Loud (Shinto’s award winning rum-milk tea), Midnight coffee vesper
Yun Shu Yao, Yellow Wine Old Fashioned
Any of their classic inventions — Bloody Mary, Sidecar, French 75, or Boulevardier.
Every drink from the menu (no joke)
Once upon a time in Oaxaca (both rooms), Banana Split (only in “Handshake”)
literally any cocktail was delicious. Try “Make Me Bigger”

Chamber Story I loved the menu design, which includes a picture of the presentation and the ABV %. Very helpful. Presentation was instagram-worthy. Nice coasters. Cocktails tasted good. Pornstar Martini had a bit disappointing presentation, compared to how it was pictured in the menu
Yoghurt Clean and compact menu. All cocktails are partially made from their own-made ingredients and have some special garnish. Creative and delicious. Nice glassware and coasters
Ron Con Tomato, Devil’s Adonis, Jamón Ibérico Fashioned
Can’t go wrong with any drink from the signature Region-map-menu
Sacred Tree Spirit, The Cat’s Taipei Infinite Stations
The Original Entrance (classy, old fashioned style)
Miracle Manhattan, Silver Screen Old Fashioned
Special Walnut Shrimp, Mango Sticky Rice
Island Old Fashioned, Ramos Gin Fizz
Guava Heaven, any variant of Gin Tonic
